scripts.build: npm --prefix Web-App/server install && npm --prefix Web-App/dashboard install && npm --prefix Web-App/dashboard run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n s,d "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix Web-App/dashboard run lint && node Rest/scripts/check-server-syntax.mjs
scripts.audit: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix Web-App/server audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix Web-App/dashboard audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix Rest/mobile-workspace audit --audit-level=high
scripts.release:verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run ops:db-backup && npm run ops:db-restore-probe
